source: 2027 mass-production entry projection for Si-based tandem modules from ITRPV: about 27% module efficiency. https://www.qualenergia.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/ITRPV-15th-Edition-2024-2.pdf
review_notes: Roadmap-based early commercial tandem anchor; suitable as the first appearance year in advanced scenarios.

source: Oxford PV tandem module roadmap: 30% module efficiency target by 2030 (with 27% by 2027 and 25% in 2025). https://www.oxfordpv.com/mainstream
review_notes: Ambitious but useful advanced-case midpoint between 2027 introduction and the 2035 tandem projection.
